title.en: However, Ye Tian didn't want to wait that long.

content.en:
Ye Tian became the lord of the Blood and Bone Territory, and naturally wanted to evolve it into the Eternal Time and Space Territory.

In this way, he is worthy of his strength and body skills, and a large number of resources can be born.

After all, compared to the Eternal Space-Time Territory, the ordinary space-time territory is far inferior in terms of area and cultivation environment, and the Eternal Space-Time Territory is suitable for the cultivation of the Immortal Realm Lord, and the Immortal Realm Lord's stay in the ordinary space-time territory is completely slowing down the cultivation speed.

At this time.

Ye Tian cultivated in the Blood Bone Territory, and he could even absorb the origin energy of the Source Sea and feed back the Blood Bone Territory, which was one of the abilities of the Immortal Realm Lord.

If this lasted for countless eternal years, the Flesh and Bone Territory would really evolve into an Eternal Space-Time Territory.

However, Ye Tian didn't want to wait that long.

He was going to trade a treasure with other Immortal Realm Lords to promote the evolution of the Blood and Bone Realm.

For ordinary Eternal Realms, such treasures must be incomparably precious, but for those top Immortal Realm Lords, they are not too precious.

After all, an Eternal Realm Lord can only refine one space-time territory, so it is useless to have a surplus of this kind of treasure, and it cannot increase their 26 strength, so it can be traded.

Eternal space-time territory, polar ice territory.

This is the territory of one of the six great leaders, the Ice Han Lord, this territory is hundreds of thousands of times larger than the Blood and Bone Domain, and it is also taken out by the Ice Han Lord as a trading place for the Lord Alliance, and many Eternal Realms can enter the Extreme Ice Giant City here to trade.

With a Legendary Lord guarding it, no Eternal Realm will cause trouble here.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Polar Ice Territory and entered the Polar Ice Giant City.

Many Eternal Realm lords have opened shops here, with a half-step Eternal Realm as the shopkeeper to manage the shops here, and even some Immortal Realm lords have ordinary Eternal Realm lords manage their shops here, so this place is also very lively.

However, not many Immortal Realm Lords usually come here to buy things.

After Ye Tian entered the Extreme Ice Giant City, he didn't enter those shops, because there couldn't be anything he needed here, he directly came to the Extreme Ice Pavilion in the Extreme Ice Giant City, which was the property of the Ice Han Lord, and only the Immortal Realm Lord or the Half-Step Immortal Realm Lord was eligible to enter here.

After every lord above the half-step immortal realm enters here, he can take a look at the acquisition information and purchase information released here, which is equivalent to giving a fair and just trading platform to the powerhouses above the half-step immortal realm.

After entering the Extreme Ice Pavilion, Ye Tian browsed the various acquisition tasks and purchase tasks here, and there were also several purchase tasks here, and the items to be purchased were treasures that could make ordinary space-time territory evolve into an eternal space-time territory.

Obviously, in recent years, there have been a lot of people who have been promoted to Immortal Realm Lords, and some half-step Eternal Realms have also hoped to obtain an Eternal Sky Territory.

"It's a pity that the original Eternal Insight Golden Sea Tree was taken away by the void, and he had already used it, so if he could trade it from him. "I thought.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian posted a purchase message and put forward his own chips, if the chips were not enough, even if other Immortal Realm Lords had such a treasure, they would not take it out and trade.

Ordinary treasures couldn't attract those Immortal Realm Lords, so Ye Tian was ready to come up with a treasure that would make many Immortal Realm Lords feel excited.

The secret art inheritance of the fusion of will and innate eternal rules!

In the space-time realm, many Eternal Realms believe that will and innate eternal rules cannot be fused, and once such a secret technique appears, it will inevitably cause a sensation.

Of course.

There is no way to cultivate such a secret technique, because it is not suitable for the territory of time and space, and can only be used as a reference.

But even so, the value of such a secret technique is very high.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian immediately released this purchase task, and once this purchase task was released, it would be transmitted to all Extreme Ice Pavilion members.

Not long after, three Eternal Realms contacted Ye Tian.

Two Immortal Lords, one Legendary Lord.

"Lord Ice Letter, she actually contacted me!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised by the Ice Letter Lord's contact, and after thinking about it carefully, he would first meet and chat with the Ice Letter Lord, after all, the treasures that could make ordinary space-time territory promotions not precious to the Ice Letter Lord were not at all precious to the Ice Letter Lord, so the asking price would not be too high, and other Immortal Realm Lords might offer a very high price, and that kind of secret art might not be able to be fully exchanged, and even other conditions might be proposed.

Therefore, what he wanted most was to trade with the Lord of Ice Letter.

The top floor of the Polar Ice Pavilion.

Ye Tian and the Ice Letter Lord came here, this is not the first time Ye Tian has seen the Ice Letter Lord, but it is the first time to exchange.

"Six-step Immortal Realm Lord, the cultivation speed of the Endless Lord is really fast, I remember that the Endless Lord only broke through to the Eternal Realm not long ago, I didn't expect to step into the Six-Step Immortal Realm Lord Realm so quickly. Lord Ice Han said with a slight surprise.

"It's just a bit of a chance!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

Soon, the two talked about getting to the point.

Lord Bing Han said: "Endless Lord, you have a secret art inheritance that fuses your will with the innate eternal rules, and you can't cultivate that kind of secret art, right?"

Ye Tian said truthfully: "Yes, that kind of secret technique can't be cultivated, but it can be used as a reference, so it's still very valuable." "

He knew that Lord Ice Han must have obtained a similar inheritance, otherwise it would be impossible to ask such a question.

He can obtain such a inheritance, and it is not surprising that Lord Binghan, as a legendary lord, has obtained such a inheritance.

"Yes, I can learn from it, but I need to go through it first to confirm the authenticity. If true, I can trade 613 with you for a treasure that can evolve the Temporal Territory into an eternal space-time territory. "Lord Ice Han said.

At this time, Ye Tian handed the inheritance he had obtained from the Silent Void Battlefield Ruins to the Lord of Ice Letter.

Of course, the inheritance he gave was not complete, after all, the official transaction had not yet begun, so naturally he would not give a complete inheritance.

Lord Ice Han browsed through it and confirmed the authenticity.

"It's indeed a true inheritance, and it's an inheritance that I don't have, but this kind of inheritance can't be cultivated, and it actually has no value for the ordinary Eternal Realm, I need a inheritance like the Five Sects. Lord Ice Han asked.

"Five Inheritances, no problem!"

Ye Tian immediately took out the five inheritances, and this time they were all complete inheritances.

Seeing that Ye Tian had really taken out the Five Sect Inheritance, the Ice Han Lord took out a stone tablet from his Void Ball, which seemed to be very small, but it was reduced by the Ice Han Lord The Void where it was located, but the real volume was very large.

"This is a heavenly monument, and integrating it into the origin of the space-time territory can promote the evolution of the space-time territory. In addition to this, it can also strengthen the defenses of the space-time territory. Lord Binghan said.

"Okay, let's trade!"

Ye Tian exchanged items with the Lord of Ice Letters, officially completing the transaction.

When the transaction was completed, Lord Ice Han suddenly smiled and said, "Endless Lord, I want to make another deal with you. "_
